response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~16 years of experience, which meets the tenure minimum, but the role is a Director-level IC Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, cloud platform vision, and advising strategic customers. The resume shows only brief, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq, ~6 months) with no demonstrated AI products, no advanced AI degree, no cloud platform leadership, and no evidence of executive-level influence or strategic advisory work. There is also a current career gap. Fit for a Principal AI Strategy role is weak.
strengths: ~16 years of broad engineering experience across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Track record of technical leadership through talks, workshops, OSS (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and community teaching
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise expected at Principal level
No evidence of Director-level IC influence, strategic customer advisory, or cloud-platform vision work
Lacks preferred MS/PhD in AI and shows only ~6 months of AI-adjacent work plus a current career gap

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth and recognized AI products
No Director-level IC / strategic advisory track record
Meets 15-year engineering tenure with broad polyglot background
